subject: Mathematics
description: graph the functions f(x) = sqrt(x), f(x) = 1/x, f(x) = x^3, f(x) = 3sqrt(x), f(x) = b^x, f(x) = |x|, and f(x) = log_b(x) where b is 2, 10, and e, and when applicable, analyze the key attributes such as domain, range, intercepts, symmetries, asymptotic behavior, and maximum and minimum given an interval

subject: Mathematics
description: describe and analyze the relationship between a function and its inverse (quadratic and square root, logarithmic and exponential), including the restriction(s) on domain, which will restrict its range

subject: Mathematics
description: describe the effect on the graph of f(x) = sqrt(x), f(x) = 1/x, f(x) = x^3, and f(x) = b^x when f(x) is replaced by af(x), f(bx), f(x - c), and f(x) + d for specific positive and negative real values of a, b, c, and d

subject: Mathematics
description: determine the effect on the graph of f(x) = sqrt(x) when f(x) is replaced by af(x), f(x) + d, f(x - c), and f(bx) for specific positive and negative real values of a, b, c, and d

description: add, subtract, and multiply polynomials

description: write the equation of a polynomial function of degree three and higher when given the zeros of the polynomial and a point on the polynomial

description: determine the quotient of a polynomial of degree three or higher divided by a polynomial of degree one and of degree two

subject: Mathematics
description: determine the linear factors of a polynomial function of degree three and of degree four using algebraic methods

description: determine linear and quadratic factors of a polynomial expression of degree three and of degree four, including factoring the sum and difference of two cubes and factoring by grouping

description: write the quadratic function given three specified points in the plane

description: analyze the effect on the graphs of f(x) = 1/x when f(x) is replaced by af(x), f(bx), f(x - c), and f(x) + d for specific positive and negative real values of a, b, c, and d

description: solve rational equations that have real solutions

description: determine the asymptotic restrictions on the domain of a rational function and represent the domain and range using interval notation, inequalities, and set notation

description: solve square root equations that have real solutions

description: determine the effects on the key attributes on the graphs of f(x) = b^x and f(x) = log_b(x) where b is 2, 10, and e when f(x) is replaced by af(x), f(x) + d, and f(x - c) for specific positive and negative real values of a, c, and d

description: formulate exponential and logarithmic equations that model real-world situations, including exponential relationships written in recursive notation

description: rewrite exponential equations as their corresponding logarithmic equations and logarithmic equations as their corresponding exponential equations

description: solve exponential equations of the form y = ab^x where a is a nonzero real number and b is greater than zero and not equal to one and single logarithmic equations having real solutions

description: determine the reasonableness of a solution to a logarithmic equation

description: add, subtract, and multiply complex numbers
